final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3:4 vertical 3x3 grid poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book), designed as 9 separate cards that can be cleanly sliced into individual posts.

Style/medium: Clean editorial design with soft illustration accents, professional social media aesthetic, ins-style wellness visual language
Composition: 3 columns × 3 rows grid layout with clear borders/gutters between each cell, each cell centered and self-contained, generous white space, no text crossing grid lines
Subject: Sleep wellness tips for women, featuring soft pillows, moons, stars, warm milk, aromatherapy, books, eye masks, curtains, beds
Scene/backdrop: Cream white and oat beige background throughout all 9 cells, unified gentle atmosphere
Lighting/mood: Soft diffused warm light, cozy and healing bedtime mood
Color palette: Cream white, light beige, pale oat, soft caramel as base; dark brown for text; warm yellow accents for lamps; minimal high-contrast elements
Materials/textures: Matte paper-like surfaces, soft fabric textures for pillows and bedding, subtle grain for warmth
Text (verbatim): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", "3. 房间温度别太高", "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", "7. 固定上床时间", "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: All 9 cells must be visually cohesive when viewed as one poster; each cell must work as standalone Xiaohongshu cover; grid lines must be precise for clean slicing; all text in Chinese only; large readable typography; no text near cut lines
Avoid: Cheap marketing aesthetic, excessive decoration, cluttered layout, garish colors, small unreadable text, English text, misaligned grid, text crossing cell boundaries, watermark, 8K stuffer words
